root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as mem_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date ,'dd/mm/yyyy') as resignation_approve_date ,sc_atm_lon_card.modify_status , sc_atm_ucf_modify_status.modify_desc FROM sc_atm_lon_card, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group -- ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_section ,sc_atm_ucf_modify_status WHERE ( sc_atm_lon_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and (sc_atm_ucf_modify_status.modify_status = sc_atm_lon_card.modify_status ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' ) and( sc_atm_lon_card.modify_status = '0' ) )
/*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_section.member_group_no )
